## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Meta-skill change (`skill-creator`, `create-agents-md`, etc.)

## Skill tested

- **Agent tool(s):** Cursor / Claude Code / Windsurf / other

## Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` frontmatter has `name` and `description`
- [ ] Description starts with a trigger ("Use this skill when...")
- [ ] No `__pycache__` or `.pyc` files included
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if this is a notable change
